description:
#ZapierPartner Sponsored by Zapier! Zapier MCP levels you up, connecting you directly to apps to automate your workflow. Start building with Zapier MCP today: https://bit.ly/4vRBaF5

Claude Cowork's built-in connectors can read your apps but often can't act on them. Here's how to set up Zapier MCP to give Cowork real permissions across 9,000+ apps, like actually sending emails and editing Google Docs for you.

0:00 Intro
0:41 The Problem with Claude Connectors
1:40 What Is Zapier MCP
2:43 Setting Up Zapier MCP
4:41 Adding More Apps
6:37 Permissions and Control
7:04 Pricing
7:25 Outro
fulltitle: The Tool That 10x'd My Claude Cowork OS (Zapier MCP)

comments.text:
Im using Zapier MCP for a while now. Im using it through claude code and rutines and in my ongoing tasks. 
It can add rows for google docs is you have a table there.
It can find and replace words in the doc and update the files in google drive. Its a very strong tool!
